lines: Quartermaster Runa pins the ledger open with one flat hand.
"No seal, no ration. No writ, no powder. No, a heroic face is not a seal."
"One packet for a field writ: beans, dressing, candle stub, entry roll if Security has not misplaced the blessed things again."
"Anything more needs a dead officer's signature or a living officer's shame."
"Maev is not official. Maev is useful. The Church has many words for sin and very few for useful."
"If she overcharges you, tell me. I will nod with great concern."
